input: Black-and-white cinematic editorial beauty portrait. Dramatic low-key Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Glowing dewy skin with fine realistic texture, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look. Single subject, calm confident mood. No text, no logos, no props. A person with a relaxed, confident closed-lip-to-soft smile and clean healthy teeth, soft light on the mouth and jaw.
